name: Steps to the Star
original_name: ไปให้ถึงดวงดาว
overview: Charam and Hamesuda are a couple that seems to be perfect.  People envy their relationship, but actually they are having so many issues. Hamesuda, tired of her husband promiscuous lifestyle, decides to have fun with any guy. Paaithong works as an architect and must take care of the big project of Charam. He has a crush on her as soon as he saw her and tries to hit on her, even knowing that she's in a relationship with Theewin. Theewin is so jealous and starts to make an assumption that leads to many misunderstandings.

trailers.title: เมื่อปัญหาชีวิตเริ่มถาโถม ทำให้เธอตัดสินใจกลับมาหาเขา | ไปให้ถึงดวงดาว | เริ่ม 3 ก.พ. นี้ | one31
